reviews.title: Remortgage
reviews.body: Remortgaged with them and the whole process from the first phone call was efficient and customer focused. They provided a very competitive product  plus they also liaised seamlessly with the solicitors (Taylor Emmet) who acted on behalf of both parties. All in all very good.

reviews.title: Everything was as expected from a…
reviews.body: Everything was as expected from a professional organisation. No complaints

reviews.title: Your money is well looked after.
reviews.body: I have only just become a member, but really impressed with their service team, joining was ultra smooth with great products and personal service, what more could you want. NBS is first class.

reviews.title: Some great staff but some poor staff
reviews.body: In the Andover branch it really depends on the member of staff who helps.  The vast majority are really good at their job.  However, there is one member of staff who really needs more training when it comes to customer service and dealing with bereavement cases, especially when the branch staff have not provided the correct information to the customer It took 3 trips into the branch before I could close an account.  Unfortunately due to her conduct we decided to close the account, withdraw all the funds and invest in another building society.

reviews.title: Disappointing Mortgage Experience – Would Not Recommend NBS
reviews.body: We took out a discounted tracker mortgage with NBS in December 2024, and our experience since then has been deeply disappointing. Despite two base rate cuts totalling 0.5%, NBS has only passed on a fraction of that to mortgage holders. This feels like selective profiteering, they benefit from the full reduction in their own borrowing costs, yet choose how much (or how little) to pass on to customers.What’s worse is that savers have been hit just as hard - they’ve slashed savings rates aggressively. So, they’re squeezing customers at both ends. I've held mortgages with several providers before, and I’ve never encountered one so reluctant to treat customers fairly when rates fall.To their credit, we are able to overpay up to 20% annually without penalty - and we’re taking full advantage of that. We’re making aggressive overpayments purely to avoid paying NBS any more interest than we have to.In stark contrast, our previous mortgage with First Direct was straightforward, transparent, and honest. The difference in customer experience is night and day.We would not take another product with NBS, and I’d advise others to look carefully at how your lender treats customers after you sign the paperwork - that’s when it really matters

reviews.title: Personal banking
reviews.body: Personal banking. The way it should’ve done. Yes the app and online is a bit backwards, but I think it’s deliberate to keep personal banking. If ever I have an issue the store can sort it out quickly I never feel out of place by popping into the store

reviews.title: A Personal Service.
reviews.body: A personal service ……you can speak with a person in branch. Online is of course also available. Nice combination!

reviews.title: My experience on opening an account with Newbury building society My appointment with Ritu on opening my…
reviews.body: My appointment with Ritu on opening my account was delightful very courteous and professional. to be treated as a human being by a human being was my highlight rather than being dictated to by a machine and AI. to some of us service and personal communication is more important sometimes than the best rates rather than being treated as a number.

reviews.title: A truly local Building Society
reviews.body: I've dealt with Newbury Building Society for 45 years and  my experience has been consistently excellent - personal and efficient. It feels as if it takes its place as a local Building Society, seriously. The possible face to face or telephone contact is always helpful and friendly.

reviews.title: Always a pleasure…
reviews.body: My wife and I have been members virtually since the time we moved to Didcot over 28 years ago and in all thar time we have never felt unwelcome or had any bad experiences. Quite the opposite in effect - always a warm welcome and friendly/ professional advice. Your interest rates are fully up to and in most cases exceed your competitors so very well done. Always a pleasure to walk into the Branch especially in your new premises which are a step change from the old ones! Well done.

reviews.title: No appointment needed!
reviews.body: I popped in on the off chance to open an ISA account and was seen to straight away. Hannah sorted it all out in a few minutes. Most impressed. But then I’ve always had great service at Newbury BS

reviews.title: Excellent service ⭐️
reviews.body: Excellent service ⭐️I rang the branch to make an appointment to open a new account. There were no convenient times available online but the lady went out of her way to find an appointment that fitted around my working hours. At the appointment I met a different lady who was equally fantastic. Great service ⭐

reviews.title: NEWBURY BUILDING SOCIETY FREEZES MY ACCOUNTS WITH NO NOTICE!!!!!!!!
reviews.body: THE NEWBURY BUILDING SOCIETY wrote to me out of the blue informing me they had frozen my savings accounts and both accounts are now DORMANT!!To unfreeze them I need to fill out a very long formalong with proving who I am along with a lot of personal questions that have no relevance.They try this old trick hoping the account holders are no longer able to manage their affairs so they can steal the money with no one noticing !Also some years ago I tried to borrow  off the Newbury Building Society, a very nasty lady asked me hundreds of pointless condescending questionsover some weeks only to offer me a fraction of what I needed for a family emergency.I easily borrowed 300% more elsewhere !I will certainly be removing my savings from the NEWBURY BUILDING SOCIETY.

reviews.title: Help form the Mortgage dept…
reviews.body: I needed some help to transfer a large amount of money to the Newbury, I sought the help of INDU in the mortgage dept and she was fantastic. Nothing was too much trouble, and she sorted things for me very quickly.Always polite and a real pleasure to talk to.Well Done young Lady.

reviews.title: Profiteering before it’s customers
reviews.body: I took a mortgage out with NBS several months ago (tracker) and despite two recent interest rate cuts (0.5% total) they have only shaved 0.3% off by June 2025. Typically will use the protecting savers argument or excuse but they have cut those rates by far more. Avoid at all cost, simple profiteering rather than passing on interest rate cuts. Won’t ever use them again (for anything).

reviews.title: Human Touch
reviews.body: Having read the reviews regarding living in the dark ages they still hold on to the human touch element. In today's society to be able to speak to a human who can make a decision following an actual discussion is amazing. I left my job of 10 years working for a major high street bank who have adopted the "computer says no" approach as there was no longer a common sense approach to lending.This far outways any modern technology. I'm with Newbury all the way.

reviews.title: I have been with Newbury Building…
reviews.body: I have been with Newbury Building society for many years and have to say they are brilliant I have never had an issue with them in all this timeI spoke to Angela Burton about a new mortgage product, Brian Marcham savings & a young girl I think her name was Mass customer service and they where all superb very friendly & knowledgeableFirst class customer service

reviews.title: Exemplary customer service
reviews.body: I used mylostaccount.org.uk to trace an old Newbury account that I knew existed but had no documents for.I received a letter within a few days (dated the day after my enquiry) clearly explaining what I needed to do to access my account. When I rang to clarify some details I was immediately put through to the right team - and the same person who'd sent the letter - who went through thorough security questions and gave more excellent advice. This was followed up very quickly by email, as was the case for all documents and processes that needed to be dealt with after that.I won't use Gemma's last name in this review as it's public, but she is an absolute star. I could not be more impressed, and have decided to keep my ISA with the Newbury largely due to her and what she represents in the Society. She clearly knows her stuff inside out, and I hope she's recognised for her excellent work. Thank you, Gemma!

reviews.title: Living in the dark ages
reviews.body: Newbury given an ISA transfer request (twice) well before maturity period expired. On expiry it took a week to process and then send the money to the new provider by (wait for it) a cheque.  What kind of 21st century financial institution transfers money using cheques? Answer - Newbury.  Someone tell them about the Faster Payment facility!!  I see this sort of out-of-date operation has been mentioned before. No progress there then.

reviews.title: Awful company
reviews.body: There are no words to describe how awful Newbury building society have been to myself and my partner. We were using them to obtain a decision in principle and the first time it went through with no issues because of the rates going down we had to submit another decision in principle and this time they decided to decline us but no information was passed to our mortgage broker or myself or partner we were told they couldn’t discuss it with anyone so we were kept in the dark with no reason as to why we were approved and then rejected.

reviews.title: Nightmare dealt with tact, diplomacy and professionalism
reviews.body: Newbury have changed their on line access systems, so that I could not gain any access to my funds.I am a Septuganarian, who has no idea how to deal with computers, let alone having to change the way I have to use them.I made a call and spoke to 3 seprerate people ( yes 3, I told you I was no good at this)Each were professional and incredibly patient and stayed with me, while they ensured I got to grips with things.I was amazed at this type of treatment, in a world where time and tolerance are often forgotten.Well done

reviews.title: time wasted on a mortgage
reviews.body: After my mortgage broker obtained my agreement in principle and we went to proceed, Newbury decided that as there are already a number of properties on the development they have interests in, there were too many properties and they no longer wanted to uphold the agreement. Had to go elsewhere as if buying a house isn’t stressful enough without the mortgage letting you down while you’ve already instructed solicitors to proceed!! Thanks for nothing but wasting my time.

reviews.title: The team at Newbury Building Society…
reviews.body: The team at Newbury Building Society are brilliant, they are helpful, knowledgeable and friendly. Their Thatcham branch has a new Onebanx machine which is brilliant for depositing cash easily and quickly and also for making withdrawals when you don't have your card on you (which I never seem to have)

reviews.title: Onebanx machine is a huge asset
reviews.body: Newbury Building Society have always been a delight to deal with. They are the only bank branch that exist in Thatcham now, and with their Onebanx machine it's been great to deposit the cash from our charity.

reviews.title: Good Luck Dealing with this lot
reviews.body: Need to change my address.  Asked how to do that - notify us in secure message.... did that Newbury Building Soc did nothing.  Asked again ... O you need to send us a photo of your driving licence... but you can't upload that through your account .. you need to email mail it to us.  Did that.  Now when I try and log on it says "Account Already exists" well of course it does !  Tried to change the password - won't do that .  Then asked for the memorable work - and failed to recognise that.    Now the fools have locked me out of my account . Will be ringing on first day they are open for business.  If not sorted with close the account and take my money else where .  Life is to short to be dealing with this lot !

reviews.title: Wasted my time. Beware.
reviews.body: After an initial experience of a friendly and helpful service, it all went down hill rapidly. Firstly if you want to remortgage within the next three months this probably isn't for you because of their lead times. But more importantly be prepared to spend hours sourcing reams of documents for them only to be told that you're not eligible for reasons that they could easily have asked you about at the start. Wasted my time. Couldn't explain their illogical decision making processes and with appalling redress. AVOID.

reviews.title: Ackim Nkole in Winchester branch
reviews.body: Ackim Nkole in the Winchester branch gave me brilliant service this week, letting me know that my possible EMA annual deposit had been increased to £6,000, which I wasn't aware of. Thank you Ackim!

reviews.title: Dickensian
reviews.body: I have had a 90 day notice ISA account with Newbury for quite a number of years which I am in the process of transferring to another provider. The transfer authority was sent to them by email. You would think it would be straightforward. Not so. I then receive an “amendment form” even though there is nothing to amend.￼So I telephone Newbury. a very nice lady, always answers the phone saying “good morning reception”. You then go through a procedure of being transferred to someone who should be able to assist you. Similarly, the staff you get are always polite, but as they are not able to deal with my problem, I ask to speak to a manager. An hour and a half later, a manager contacts me. I explain to her that there is nothing to amend and I simply want them to transfer the ISA. She still wants me to complete the amendment form together with proof of identity. I explain there is nothing to amend I just want the ISA transferring. I explain that my signature is on the transfer authority which they have received and which will match their records. They are still not happy. I also explain that I had to complete another one of their forms a few weeks ago with all my details and signature on ￼to enable me to access my details online. They are still still not happy. I explain that I am not prepared to complete another form and they will have to settle for my emailing them a copy of my driving licence. Having done so I receive an automated reply to my email, telling me that there will be up to a five day response. Really!!!Come on guys, this is the 21st century. I have ISAs with other providers and their websites and procedures are slick and up-to-date.

reviews.title: Great Products with Excellent Service
reviews.body: As a new customer opened a new fixed rate Bond. Very quick and easy on line process to follow. Money transferred to the bond account without any delays. Excellent service comparable or better than many larger financial providers plus good interest rates to boot!

reviews.title: A friendly branch in Didcot town centre, however the online service is rubbish.
reviews.body: Friendly staff, and a branch on the high street. Good communication, and the ‘Existing Members’ account pays good rates. As banks or building societies go the Newbury is pretty good - well OK - sort of - depending on what you are looking for. It can take an hour long visit to the branch to withdraw a hundred quid, and the online service sucks. It can take days to access funds while jumping through hoops, making repeated phone calls, and waiting for verification codes through the post! The online service might work for a bit only then to stop working shortly afterwards, requiring more hoops to be jumped, more phone calls and more waiting for more verification codes. It’s littered with glitches, unreliable and frustrating.  ‘A terrible shame. The App is just as bad. Worked for an hour. Now doesn’t work. If I am being honest I leave a token amount of money with the Newbury to preserve the jobs of their staff now. A bit like supporting a charity. Preserving a rare breed. Real people staffing branches on the high street, but my patience is wearing thin.

reviews.title: Chaos reigns supreme
reviews.body: I.S.A. rates. Chaotic organisation when it comes to responding to B. of E. rate rises.Furthermore, online dysfunctional today.N.B.S. needs to grow up and compare itself with institutions such as the C.B.S.

reviews.title: Unable to fund new account
reviews.body: Opened a new online account with Newbury BS and they have returned the funding to my nominated account twice even after sending me a secure message confirming the account was ready for a deposit. Calls to the head office 0800 number are routinely internally forwarded to random branches where the staff have no clue what is going on and cannot provide answers or return calls. This is extremely poor service and indicates Newbury BS cannot offer a proper Internet savings account service. Ten days after applying, the account is still effectively unavailable.

reviews.title: Another outdated financial organisation…
reviews.body: Another outdated financial organisation with archaic methods and systems.Opened a savings account online, gave me the account details, good to go. Or not?Paid money with a faster payment from my bank account to this new account. Remember, I had the new account details from the online application. Only found out all was not good when this payment was returned to my bank after looking at my bank statement a few days later.Called the Newbury to be told it still wasn't sorted or ready to accept payments in. They'll get back to me when it's ready. Could take several more days yet.I'm getting really fed up with these Mickey Mouse organisations that try to pretend they know what they're doing in the financial world.

reviews.title: Hopeless, outdated, arrogant staff, avoid
reviews.body: Applied for 2 online accounts. Supposed to be online but aren't really as to open they have to be checked manually, then checks done and then days later you sre told whether everything is OK. I an account is online it should be online and not having to have manual checks. This building society is still in the dark ages. Have given up and gone elsewhere where online is online. Webchat was totally useless and agent hopeless and arrogant. Give them a wide birth

reviews.title: Really slow and rarely respond to…
reviews.body: Really slow and rarely respond to emails  and when they do they don’t answer the question. If they offer on a mortgage and they have said they are willing to lend the money and all forms requested have been given then why slow the process down especially when it’s for a business. I have dealt with much better companies I’m afraid.

reviews.title: THANK YOU!
reviews.body: I got offered NBS via a mortgage broker. The whole process was very easy.The only reason as to why it isn't 5 stars is for the simple reason that when being a legal document the address that I was buying was mis-spelt/missing letters and after requesting for this to be changed and updated on the documents that I received, Mortgage Deed and Mortgage Offer - only one out of the two were updated and then had a covering letter to confirm that they have updated the correct spelling.I wasn't happy signing a document that wasn't correct and then when the request as redone not all of the documents were updated.I am very happy with NBS as they also sent me a welcome gift box with like a starter kit of being a home owner which was a really nice touch.

reviews.title: Useless.....
reviews.body: Useless...... Can't even do a Credit Search properly without getting names wrong!

reviews.title: Generally good rates but
reviews.body: Generally good rates but service is not its strong point owing to distancing and it is exceedingly slow.

reviews.title: I'm a first time buyer and would like…
reviews.body: I'm a first time buyer and would like to say Lisa Wege was amazing. She went above and beyond for me. She was very responsive and made it a stress free process. I would highly recommend. Thanks again Paul C
